transcript: areas of high and low pressure. Place something on the aquarium that shields it from outside air. Then introduce some smoke so we can see the air moving. Kids, don't do this without parental permission and assistance. I've seen it done with a burning paper straw pinched at the end opposite the flame. Plastic straws don't work, kids! With the smoke in the aquarium, we can see that the wind moves from the areas of high pressure to the areas of low pressure, or the cool air moves to where the warm air is. Now, think of the earth.
